description_long: This is a large, rectangular urban cabinet with a matte black exterior and two tall, vertically-oriented doors on the front. The doors feature prominent, semi-transparent glass panels, allowing partial visibility into the cabinet's interior. The cabinet's structure is robust and angular, with clean, straight edges and a flat top surface suitable for supporting additional objects. The doors appear to have subtle vertical slots, likely for handles or ventilation, and are hinged on the outer sides. The sides and back of the cabinet are solid and opaque, providing structural support and security. This type of cabinet is commonly used for secure storage in public urban environments such as bus stops, parks, or garages.
description: A large, matte black urban cabinet with two tall glass-paneled doors and a sturdy, angular design. The semi-transparent doors allow partial interior visibility and the flat top can support additional items.
description_view_0: Front view showing two tall glass-paneled doors with vertical slots and a flat top surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth and the thickness of the doors, with one glass panel visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, opaque back with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other glass door and the cabinet's angular profile.
